title: Aswan ⇄ Dendera ⇄ Luxor
summary: The extended "Long Cruise" — seven nights threading the southern temples with the exclusive pilgrimage to Abydos and Dendera, at the most generous pace.
routeOverview: Seven nights combining the classic southern route with the special excursion to Abydos and Dendera — the same sacred itinerary as our six-night Long Cruise, with an extra day to savour it. Sailable in either direction.

timeline.title: Detailed day-by-day coming soon
timeline.description: We're finalising the full daily programme for this voyage. Contact us and we'll share the complete itinerary, tailored to your dates and group.
